knowledge_notes: Defaults shown are for the R01 mechanism as specified by the caller. Several page limits vary by mechanism (Research Strategy: 12 pages for R01, 6 for R21/R03). Grounded in the NIH Application Instructions for Research (G.400 series) and the NIH Grants Policy Statement. NIAID may impose institute-specific instructions through a Funding Opportunity Notice; resolve those via solicitation-doc-modifications-udm.

document_requirements.label: Cover Letter
document_requirements.description: Optional freeform cover letter to NIH receipt and referral. May include assignment requests, referees, reviewer-conflict disclosures, or statements for late submission.

document_requirements.label: Project Summary/Abstract
document_requirements.description: Succinct, accessible description of the proposed work. Written for a general scientific audience and used by NIH for public reporting.

document_requirements.label: Project Narrative
document_requirements.description: Short public-facing relevance statement describing the project's relevance to public health. Distinct from the Research Strategy.
document_requirements.format_spec: 2–3 sentences describing public-health relevance; written for non-scientists.

document_requirements.label: Specific Aims
document_requirements.description: One-page statement of the specific objectives of the proposed research, the hypotheses being tested, and the expected outcomes.
document_requirements.format_spec: Required section heading 'Specific Aims'. One page maximum.

document_requirements.label: Research Strategy
document_requirements.description: Main technical body of the NIH application. For R01, organized into Significance, Innovation, and Approach subsections; Preliminary Studies for new applications are embedded in Approach.
document_requirements.format_spec: Required subsection headings for R01: Significance, Innovation, Approach. Page limit is 12 for R01, 6 for R21/R03.

document_requirements.label: Bibliography & References Cited
document_requirements.description: Bibliography of every reference cited in the Research Strategy and other application components. Complete citations required.
document_requirements.format_spec: No page limit. Include every reference cited in the application.

document_requirements.label: Biographical Sketch
document_requirements.description: NIH-format biographical sketch for each senior/key person, prepared via SciENcv.
document_requirements.format_spec: NIH-approved format (SciENcv). Required sections: A. Personal Statement; B. Positions, Scientific Appointments and Honors; C. Contributions to Science (up to 5 contributions, up to 4 products each); D. Scholastic Performance (early-stage and fellowship applications only).

document_requirements.label: Other Support
document_requirements.description: NIH-format disclosure of all active and pending support for each senior/key person. Signed by the Authorized Organization Representative at Just-in-Time.
document_requirements.format_spec: NIH Other Support format. Electronic signature by the Authorized Organization Representative required at Just-in-Time submission.

document_requirements.label: Facilities and Other Resources
document_requirements.description: Description of the facilities, resources, and environment that will contribute to the probability of success of the project. Excludes equipment — Equipment is a separate section for NIH.

document_requirements.label: Equipment
document_requirements.description: Separate section listing major items of equipment already available for the project. Distinct from Facilities and Other Resources in the NIH application template.

document_requirements.label: Budget
document_requirements.description: Modular budget (direct costs in $25,000 increments up to $250,000/year) or detailed R&R budget depending on total direct costs and mechanism requirements.
document_requirements.format_spec: Modular budget permitted when direct costs are ≤ $250,000/year; otherwise detailed R&R Budget Form is required.

document_requirements.label: Budget Justification
document_requirements.description: Narrative justification for budget line items. Brief for modular budgets (Personnel Justification, Consortium Justification, Additional Narrative Justification); comprehensive for detailed budgets.
document_requirements.format_spec: For modular budgets: three required sub-justifications (Personnel, Consortium/Contractual, Additional Narrative). For detailed budgets: justification for each line item.

document_requirements.label: Data Management and Sharing (DMS) Plan
document_requirements.description: Required plan describing how scientific data will be managed and shared, including data types, standards, preservation and access timeline, and oversight.
document_requirements.format_spec: Maximum 2 pages. Required for all NIH-funded research that generates scientific data.

document_requirements.label: Other Plan(s) — Resource Sharing
document_requirements.description: Separate resource-sharing plans (Model Organism Sharing Plan, Genomic Data Sharing Plan) when the research generates relevant resources or data.
document_requirements.conditional_on: Research generates model organisms requiring sharing under NIH policy OR generates large-scale human or non-human genomic data subject to the NIH Genomic Data Sharing policy.

document_requirements.label: Authentication of Key Biological and/or Chemical Resources
document_requirements.description: Description of methods to ensure the identity and validity of key biological and chemical resources (cell lines, specialty chemicals, antibodies, biologics) used in the proposed research.
document_requirements.format_spec: Maximum 1 page. Required only when key biological or chemical resources are used.
document_requirements.conditional_on: The proposed research uses key biological or chemical resources as defined by NIH (cell lines, specialty chemicals, antibodies, and other biologics).

document_requirements.label: Multiple PD/PI Leadership Plan
document_requirements.description: Required plan for applications with more than one Program Director / Principal Investigator. Describes the governance and organizational structure, communication plans, and processes for resolving conflicts and reallocating resources.
document_requirements.conditional_on: More than one PD/PI is named on the application.

document_requirements.label: Protection of Human Subjects / PHS Human Subjects and Clinical Trials Information
document_requirements.description: PHS Human Subjects and Clinical Trials Information form plus the Protection of Human Subjects narrative. Clinical-trial-specific sections apply when the study meets NIH's definition of a clinical trial.
document_requirements.format_spec: Completed PHS Human Subjects and Clinical Trials Information form. Clinical-trial questionnaires and protocol required when applicable.
document_requirements.conditional_on: The research involves human subjects as defined by 45 CFR 46.

document_requirements.label: Vertebrate Animals
document_requirements.description: Narrative addressing the five required vertebrate-animals review points: description of procedures, justifications, minimization of pain and distress, and euthanasia method.
document_requirements.format_spec: Required review points addressed: description of procedures involving animals, justifications for the use, description of interventions to minimize discomfort, and method of euthanasia.
document_requirements.conditional_on: The research involves live vertebrate animals.

document_requirements.label: Select Agent Research
document_requirements.description: Disclosure of research involving HHS or USDA select agents and toxins as defined in 42 CFR Part 73, 7 CFR Part 331, or 9 CFR Part 121.
document_requirements.conditional_on: The research involves select agents or toxins listed in 42 CFR Part 73, 7 CFR Part 331, or 9 CFR Part 121.

document_requirements.label: Inclusion of Women, Minorities, and Children / Inclusion Enrollment Report
document_requirements.description: Description of plans to include women, racial and ethnic minorities, and individuals across the lifespan in clinical research; tabular inclusion enrollment reports for each study.
document_requirements.format_spec: Planned and Cumulative Inclusion Enrollment Report tables for each study involving human subjects.
document_requirements.conditional_on: The research involves human subjects subject to NIH's inclusion policy (most NIH-defined clinical research).
